{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Karoshan blood
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax's uniform was splattered with [[Karoshan blood]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c19">''The Knight'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
